files_to_change.change: Add HeaderOffset type, ContentStore.headerCache/headerCacheMu fields, computeHeaderOffsets helper, ReadPartial method, InvalidateHeaderCache exported method; call invalidation from Append's existing WAL apply closure.
Call cs.InvalidateHeaderCache(originalFileID) inside ExecuteSplitRedirectStub's and ExecuteSplitAtomic's WAL apply closures, immediately after cat.Put succeeds.

new_test_files: engine/catalog/content_test.go (extend, new cases for ReadPartial + Append invalidation)
risk: Low-medium: new code path, no existing callers of ReadPartial to break. Main risk is lock ordering/deadlock between cs.stripes and the new headerCacheMu -- mitigated by using a dedicated, non-reentrant-conflicting mutex and never taking cs.stripes from within split/execute.go.
backward_compat: Additive only: new exported type (HeaderOffset), two new exported methods (ReadPartial, InvalidateHeaderCache) on ContentStore. No existing signatures changed.
